scripts.dev: sh -c 'PORT=3000 npm run dev --workspace @workspace/api-server & npm run dev --workspace @workspace/codearena & wait'
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@workspace/api-server && npm run build --workspace=@workspace/codearena && mkdir -p api && cp -r artifacts/api-server/dist/* api/
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
